entry_tickets.name: Dagsbillet (Day Ticket)
entry_tickets.description: Full day access to LEGO House experience zones

entry_tickets.name: Eftermiddagsbillet (Afternoon Ticket)
entry_tickets.description: Afternoon entry from 3 PM on days with 7 PM closing

entry_tickets.name: LEGO House & LEGOLAND Kombibillet (Combo Ticket)
entry_tickets.description: Single ticket providing access to both LEGO House and LEGOLAND park

entry_tickets.name: Årskort (Annual Pass)
entry_tickets.description: Unlimited access for one year to LEGO House
features: 25% discount on LEGO Masters Academy through May 31, 2026

lego_masters_academy.description: Build your own LEGO pond, animate creatures, complete interactive challenges

lego_masters_academy.description: Upgrade building skills by personalizing your own LEGO minifigure

lego_masters_academy.name: aROUND the bricks we go - Level 3 (Danish)

lego_masters_academy.description: Master advanced building techniques including S.N.O.T. method

stay_packages.name: Det ultimative LEGO ophold (Ultimate LEGO Stay)
stay_packages.description: Combines LEGO House, LEGOLAND Billund, and overnight accommodation

stay_packages.name: LEGO House Vinterophold (Winter Stay)
stay_packages.description: Winter holiday package with LEGO House, hotel stay, and indoor pool access
features: Billund Bad indoor swimming pool access

premium_experiences.name: LEGO House Experience + Factory Visit
premium_experiences.description: Full day at LEGO House with exclusive behind-the-scenes factory tour

premium_experiences.name: LEGO House Brick Tour
premium_experiences.description: Private group experience with personal guide and exclusive Meet & Greet with LEGO designer

premium_experiences.name: LEGO House Exclusive Designer Evening
premium_experiences.description: Special evening event for LEGO Space fans

premium_experiences.name: LEGO Fan Tour
premium_experiences.description: Group tour with 25 LEGO enthusiasts from worldwide locations

premium_experiences.name: LEGO Inside Tour
premium_experiences.description: Ultimate 3-day LEGO fan experience with exclusive access to restricted areas

groups.name: Playful Tour (Group Guided Tours)
groups.description: Private guide experience learning about the home of the brick
